title: Sword of Gryffindor
description: Resource pack for Sword of Gryffindor
body:
My first resourcepack. A simple resoursepack for gryffindor sword.This resource pack turns an iron sword into the legendary Sword of Godric Gryffindor. An absolutely vanilla resource pack, it should be suitable for many versions, but I only tested it on 1.20.1.
[Support me on PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=ZY6NQ5T2YTB6C)
